title: Sri Lanka Return of Income — Individual (Form Asmt_IIT_001)
description: The Inland Revenue Department's (IRD) annual "Return of Income – Individual", the principal individual income tax return filed under section 126 of the Inland Revenue Act, No. 24 of 2017 for the year of assessment 2025/2026. Electronic filing is mandatory for every person under section 113(1B) of the same Act; this document models the static, currently-published specimen IRD itself distributes to describe the return's structure, not IRD's authenticated e-filing wizard. Models the return's own Section 01 (Statement of Tax Calculation — the cage-numbered income, deduction, relief, and tax-payable summary lines that roll up figures computed in the return's own ten numbered Schedules), the Part E schedule-attached checklist, and Section 02 (the optional approved-accountant/preparer disclosure and the taxpayer's own mandatory declaration). Out of scope: the detailed line-by-line breakdown inside Schedules 1 through 10 themselves (over 130 further numbered cages across a separate 12-page companion document, Asmt_IIT_002, covering employment/business/investment/other income detail, qualifying-payment and solar-panel relief computations, withholding/advance-tax credits, and multi-year loss carry-forward) and the Statement of Assets and Liabilities (Asmt_IIT_003) — each a natural future companion schema, following this registry's established convention (e.g. `il/tax-authority/1301-personal-details`) of scoping a first schema to a large multi-schedule return's own summary/identity/declaration structure rather than every downstream schedule. This document describes the return only; it does not submit anything on the filer's behalf, and does not imply endorsement by the Government of Sri Lanka or the Inland Revenue Department. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Sri Lanka.

source.documentRef: Form No. Asmt_IIT_001_E, "Return of Income – Individual", Year of Assessment 2025/2026, English edition

verification.notes:
GOV-3267 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Opens Sri Lanka's Taxes vertical (Sri Lanka now 5 of 6: Passport, DMV, Visa, National ID, Taxes; Business Formation remains a confirmed dead end — see below). Independently re-fetched via plain `curl` (no login/CAPTCHA gate; the IRD site serves this PDF directly from a SharePoint-backed document library): HTTP 200, content-type `application/pdf`, content-length 778,937 bytes, `Last-Modified: Thu, 09 Jul 2026`, sha256 `d89252750a27800e82139de8543eaa5be0f48236f3c61df47c95dea01aab6161`. Companion schedule document cross-referenced for schedule-number/content accuracy: `https://www.ird.gov.lk/en/Downloads/IT_Individuals_Doc/Asmt_IIT_002_2025_2026_E.pdf`, HTTP 200, `application/pdf`, 3,107,459 bytes, sha256 `13941f60b8f45824eb5eb5d6d97387dd25c7078ee86c4e35a555b84fbcbb0264` (not modelled in this document's own `fields[]`, only used to verify each Schedule's own title/cage-number range for the Part E checklist and the cage-cross-reference notes in this document's field descriptions). Both PDFs extracted via `pdfjs-dist` (legacy CJS build, 3.11.174, pinned per this registry's own convention): a genuine, non-scanned text layer confirmed on both (2 and 12 pages respectively), zero `/AcroForm`/`/Widget` markers on either (a flat print-and-hand-fill specimen, not an interactive PDF). Both pages of Asmt_IIT_001 were additionally rendered to PNG via `pdfjs-dist`+`node-canvas` to check for asterisk/required-field markers; the embedded TrueType font did not fully rasterize glyphs in this renderer (most cell labels render blank, a known pdfjs/node-canvas embedded-font limitation, not a defect in the source), but the visible cage/checkbox grid structure was confirmed and, combined with a full-text grep of the extracted layer (exactly one `*` character, an unrelated "more than one person" footnote on the accountant/preparer block — "*If more than one person involved, use a separate sheet to fill the above details and attach to the return.", not modelled as a field since it carries no filer-entered data of its own), confirms this form carries no asterisk/required-marker convention at all. Requiredness for every field below is therefore a disclosed judgment call from statutory context (the return is legally mandatory; every cage feeding Part A/B/C's own running tax computation is filled with a figure, zero if not applicable) rather than derived from an explicit form marking, following the same approach this registry already took for `pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37` and other flat print-form Taxes-vertical schemas with no JS-validation rules block to consult. `taxYear` follows this registry's own established convention for annual return schemas of a plain `taxYear`/`yearOfAssessment`-style field rather than the `edition` axis (see `pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37`'s own `taxYear` field and VERSIONING.md §4 — a new assessment year would be a new `edition`, but the filer-entered assessment-year value on the form itself is still modelled as a field, matching precedent). `balanceTaxPayable` (cage 190) and `refundClaimed` (cage 200) are mutually exclusive per the form's own printed instructions ("If 170>180, Then 170–180" / "If 170<180, Then 180–170") but are both modelled as optional rather than requiredWhen-gated on each other, since GovSchema's `requiredWhen` only supports simple field-equality conditions, not a comparison between two other numeric fields; this exclusivity is disclosed here rather than mis-modelled. `residencyStatus` and `seniorCitizen` are both modelled as required, matching the form's own top-right always-present checkbox/Yes-No block with no visible option to leave blank. The Part E schedule-attached checklist (Sch. 1–10) is modelled as ten independent booleans, each optional, since a filer only attaches the schedules relevant to their own income types — Schedule labels/scope (Employment; Business; Investment; Other; Qualifying Payments & Expenditure Relief, including the solar-panel-relief sub-schedule 5C; WHT on Final Withholding Payments; Advance Income Tax/WHT; Tax Calculation; Tax Credits; Loss Adjustment) were independently confirmed against each schedule's own printed title in Asmt_IIT_002. Section 02's approved-accountant/preparer block is requiredWhen-gated on `preparedByApprovedAccountant`; its own printed instruction ("If 'Yes' fill PART-A and attach the certificate/s issued by such person") is additionally modelled as a `documents[]` supporting-evidence entry (`approvedAccountantCertificate`) gated the same way, since the certificate is a physical attachment distinct from the disclosure fields themselves. The taxpayer's own declaration statement is modelled as a required `documents[]` attestation entry, quoted verbatim, following this registry's established convention for signed/quoted declaration text (see `il/tax-authority/1301-personal-details`). `Date of Issue` and `Due Date`, printed in the same header block as the TIN/Address cage, are excluded as IRD-populated administrative fields, not filer-entered data, consistent with this registry's convention of excluding office-only content (the general statutory due date — 30 November following the year of assessment — is also stated in the form's own footer instructions rather than being a per-filer variable).

**Business Formation vertical re-screened this cycle and remains a confirmed dead end.** The national Department of the Registrar of Companies' (`drc.gov.lk`) core incorporation pathway (Form 1 name reservation, Form 5 incorporation) is exclusively system-generated through the authenticated eROC portal (`eroc.drc.gov.lk`) with no static blank specimen; the only downloadable static specimens on `drc.gov.lk` are secondary filings (Form 18/19/20 director-and-secretary consent/change forms, Form 40 re-registration of a company already incorporated under the 1982 Companies Act) — none is a first-time company-formation application. No national-level sole-proprietorship/partnership registration form exists either; that function is genuinely decentralized to provincial registrars, consistent with the already-known thin Western-Province-only BNR-01 candidate (`bnr.wp.gov.lk`, ~15 fields) left on backlog by a prior cycle. Not re-authored this cycle in favor of the stronger, national-level Taxes candidate documented above.

2 valid mock scenarios (a resident salaried filer with no preparer and a refund claimed; a self-employed filer using a paid preparer with a balance tax payable and two schedules attached) plus 5 mutation-control fixtures (a missing statically-required field, a missing accountant field while `preparedByApprovedAccountant` is true, an invalid `residencyStatus` enum value, an invalid `taxYear` format, and a missing required `taxpayerDeclaration` document) are committed under `conformance/lk/ird/return-of-income-individual/1.0.0/`. An ephemeral, from-scratch conformance checker (deriving required/requiredWhen rules directly from this schema's own `fields[]`/`documents[]`, discarded after use, not committed) ran all 7: both valid scenarios at 0 errors, all 5 mutation controls each raising exactly 1 error. The same script confirmed every `requiredWhen` field reference resolves (0 dangling references). Validated clean with `node tools/validate.mjs` and `node tools/validate-ajv.mjs`, individually and as part of the full registry run.

fields.name: taxYear
fields.label: Year of Assessment
fields.description: The year of assessment this return covers, in the form's own "YYYY/YYYY" split-year format (Sri Lanka's tax year runs 1 April to 31 March).

fields.name: taxpayerIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN)
fields.description: The filer's Taxpayer Identification Number issued by IRD.

fields.name: taxpayerAddress
fields.label: Address
fields.description: The filer's address as registered with IRD.

fields.name: residencyStatus
fields.label: Resident / Non-Resident
fields.description: The filer's residency status for the year of assessment.

fields.name: seniorCitizen
fields.label: Senior Citizen
fields.description: Whether the filer qualifies as a senior citizen.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, top-right box — "Senior Citizen Yes / No"

fields.name: employmentIncome
fields.label: Employment Income (Schedule 1)
fields.description: Total employment income, carried forward from Schedule 1 cage 111.

fields.name: businessIncome
fields.label: Business Income (Schedule 2)
fields.description: Total business income (sole proprietorship, partnership share, and trust-beneficiary share), carried forward from Schedule 2 cage 215.

fields.name: investmentIncome
fields.label: Investment Income (Schedule 3)
fields.description: Total investment income, carried forward from Schedule 3 cage 315.

fields.name: otherIncome
fields.label: Other Income (Schedule 4)
fields.description: Total other income, carried forward from Schedule 4 cage 403.

fields.name: assessableIncome
fields.label: Assessable Income
fields.description: Sum of employment, business, investment, and other income (cages 10+20+30+40).

fields.name: reliefForRentIncome
fields.label: Relief for Rent Income (Schedule 3)
fields.description: Relief for rent income — 25% of total rent income from sole proprietorship and partnership — carried forward from Schedule 3 cage 316.

fields.name: reliefOnSolarPanel
fields.label: Relief on resident's Solar panel (Schedule 5)
fields.description: Relief for a resident individual's expenditure on fixing solar panels on their premises, carried forward from Schedule 5C cage 512.

fields.name: personalRelief
fields.label: Personal Relief
fields.description: The filer's statutory personal relief amount.

fields.name: totalReliefs
fields.label: Total Reliefs
fields.description: Sum of the rent-income relief, solar-panel relief, and personal relief (cages 60+70+80).

fields.name: qualifyingPayments
fields.label: Qualifying Payments (Schedule 5)
fields.description: Total deductible qualifying payments (approved-charity/government donations and related expenditure reliefs), carried forward from Schedule 5A/5B cage 510.

fields.name: totalDeductionsFromAssessableIncome
fields.label: Total Deductions from Assessable Income
fields.description: Sum of total reliefs and qualifying payments (cages 90+100).

fields.name: taxableIncome
fields.label: Taxable Income
fields.description: Assessable income less total deductions from assessable income (cage 50 minus cage 110).

fields.name: taxOnTerminalBenefits
fields.label: Tax on Terminal Benefits (Schedule 8)
fields.description: Tax on terminal benefits, carried forward from Schedule 8 cage 805.

fields.name: taxOnGainOnRealizationOfInvestmentAssets
fields.label: Tax on Gain on Realization of Investment Assets (Schedule 8)
fields.description: Tax on gain on realization of investment assets (own and from partnership), carried forward from Schedule 8 cages 806.3 and 807.3.

fields.name: taxOnBalanceTaxableIncome
fields.label: Tax on Balance Taxable Income (Schedule 8)
fields.description: Tax on the balance of taxable income at the applicable special/progressive rates, carried forward from Schedule 8 cage 810.

fields.name: taxOnFinalWithholdingPayments
fields.label: Tax on Final Withholding Payments (WHT not deducted) (Schedule 8)
fields.description: Tax on final withholding payments where WHT was not deducted, carried forward from Schedule 6B cage 614 via Schedule 8 cage 811.

fields.name: totalTaxPayable
fields.label: Total Tax Payable
fields.description: Sum of the four tax-on-income components (cages 130+140+150+160).

fields.name: taxCredits
fields.label: Tax Credits (Schedule 9)
fields.description: Total tax credits (foreign tax credit, APIT, advance income tax, withholding tax, and installment payments), carried forward from Schedule 9 cage 912.

fields.name: balanceTaxPayable
fields.label: Balance Tax Payable
fields.description: Populated only when total tax payable (cage 170) exceeds tax credits (cage 180); equal to cage 170 minus cage 180. Mutually exclusive with refundClaimed — the form's own instruction directs the filer to complete exactly one of the two, and GovSchema's requiredWhen condition does not support a numeric-comparison gate between two other fields, so this exclusivity is disclosed here rather than encoded.

fields.name: refundClaimed
fields.label: Refund Claimed
fields.description: Populated only when tax credits (cage 180) exceed total tax payable (cage 170); equal to cage 180 minus cage 170. Mutually exclusive with balanceTaxPayable — see that field's own description.

fields.name: totalExemptExcludedIncome
fields.label: Total Exempt/Excluded Income
fields.description: Total exempt/excluded income across all four income categories, applicable only when the filer has such income; sum of Schedule 1 cage 115, Schedule 2 cage 216, Schedule 3 cage 317, and Schedule 4 cage 407.

fields.name: foreignCurrencyRemittedAmount
fields.label: Foreign Currency Remitted Amounts into Sri Lanka during the year
fields.description: Total foreign currency remitted into Sri Lanka during the year across employment, business, investment, and other income, applicable only when the filer remitted foreign currency; carried forward from Schedule 4 cage 406.e.

fields.name: schedule1Attached
fields.label: Sch. 1 — Employment Income
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 1 (Employment Income) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule2Attached
fields.label: Sch. 2 — Business Income
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 2 (Business Income) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule3Attached
fields.label: Sch. 3 — Investment Income
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 3 (Investment Income) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule4Attached
fields.label: Sch. 4 — Other Income
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 4 (Other Income) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule5Attached
fields.label: Sch. 5 — Qualifying Payments & Expenditure Relief
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 5 (Qualifying Payments & Expenditure Relief, including the solar-panel-relief sub-schedule 5C) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule6Attached
fields.label: Sch. 6 — WHT on Final Withholding Payments
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 6 (WHT on Final Withholding Payments) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule7Attached
fields.label: Sch. 7 — Advance Income Tax (AIT) / Withholding Tax (WHT)
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 7 (Advance Income Tax / Withholding Tax) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule8Attached
fields.label: Sch. 8 — Tax Calculation
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 8 (Tax Calculation) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule9Attached
fields.label: Sch. 9 — Tax Credits
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 9 (Tax Credits) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: schedule10Attached
fields.label: Sch. 10 — Loss Adjustment
fields.description: Marked when Schedule 10 (Loss Adjustment) is filled and attached to this return.

fields.name: preparedByApprovedAccountant
fields.label: Whether the return or part of the return is prepared by an Approved Accountant or any other person for a payment
fields.description: Whether this return, or part of it, was prepared by an approved accountant or any other person for payment. If "Yes", Part A of Section 02 must be completed and the person's certificate attached.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02 — "Whether the return or part of the return is prepared by an Approved Accountant or any other person for a payment? YES / NO"

fields.name: accountantName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Name of the approved accountant or other paid preparer.

fields.name: accountantDesignation
fields.label: Designation
fields.description: Professional designation of the approved accountant or other paid preparer.

fields.name: accountantTelephoneOrMobile
fields.label: Telephone Number / Mobile
fields.description: Telephone or mobile number of the approved accountant or other paid preparer.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part A — "Telephone Number Mobile"

fields.name: accountantEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: Email address of the approved accountant or other paid preparer.

fields.name: accountantCertificationDate
fields.label: Date of the Certification
fields.description: Date the approved accountant or other paid preparer signed the certification.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part A — "Date of the Certification"

fields.name: declarantFullName
fields.label: Full Name of the Declarant
fields.description: Full name of the taxpayer declaring this return.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part B — "Full Name of the Declarant"

fields.name: declarantTelephoneOrMobile
fields.label: Telephone Number / Mobile
fields.description: Telephone or mobile number of the declarant.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part B — "Telephone Number Mobile"

fields.name: declarantEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: Email address of the declarant.

fields.name: declarantNicOrPassportNumber
fields.label: NIC Number/Passport Number
fields.description: National Identity Card number or passport number of the declarant.
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part B — "NIC Number/Passport Number"

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.description: Date the declarant signs the declaration.

documents.label: Declaration of the Taxpayer
documents.statement: I declare to the best of my knowledge and belief that all particulars furnished in the Return of Income are true, correct and complete. I am aware that making an incorrect, false, or misleading statement is an offence.
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02, Part B — Declaration of the Taxpayer

documents.label: Certificate issued by the Approved Accountant or other paid preparer
documents.sourceRef: Page 2, Section 02 — "(If 'Yes' fill PART-A and attach the certificate/s issued by such person.)"
